title: How Smartphones Sabotage Your Brain's Ability to Focus Vocabulary

section.title: How Smartphones Sabotage Your Brain's Ability to Focus Vocabulary
section.summary: Vocabulary related to cognitive focus, technology interference, and psychology, featuring terms like 'cognitive load' and 'anxiety-inducing'.

questions.prompt: What is the French translation for 'to sabotage'?
questions.explanation: According to page 43, 'to sabotage' translates exactly to 'saboter'.

questions.explanation: The source defines 'an allowance' as 'un montant, une allocation'.
